body.title: reading bootstrap mode — TWM mode primitive + gateway min_tier + PROC_READING_BOOTSTRAP habit
body.result: D268 implemented: TWM mode_override category + _force_cloud_mode flag in InferenceGateway (skips Ollama, routes to t4 when min_tier=tier.4 active). bootstrap_reader.py tools push/expire mode with TTL, record OR balance baseline. PROC_READING_BOOTSTRAP habit seeded. 5 unit tests, 560 total passing.
body.description: Production primitive for mode-switched reading. Three components: (1) define MODE entry convention in TWM content_csb; (2) gateway reads min_tier from active MODE entry before tier selection; (3) PROC_READING_BOOTSTRAP workflow habit — pushes MODE, drains identity_weight>0.8 reading_list docs at Sonnet, records baseline escape rate for ROI comparison. Enables: calibrated bootstrap investment + unattended high-quality reading passes + future mode generalization.
